attestation.commitment_witness: this document is committed to git before beacon.committed_not_before; the commit containing it predates the pulse's existence, which is the commitment's entire force
attestation.pulse_disclosure: the full JSON of the selected pulse is embedded verbatim in the Part II manifest's draw provenance so the derivation is re-checkable forever against the beacon's public archive
attestation.remint_policy: any deviation, remint, or re-selection requires a disclosed amendment in the Part II chain stating why
attestation.single_expansion: no other master seed has been or will be expanded for Part II; exactly one pulse is selected by the rule above and exactly one seed derived from it

beacon.retrieval_hint: GET {base_uri}/pulse/time/next/<epoch-milliseconds of committed_not_before minus one millisecond>; non-normative, the selection_rule is authoritative
beacon.selection_rule: the unique pulse on chain 2 with the smallest timeStamp greater than or equal to committed_not_before; the beacon emits one pulse per minute, so under normal operation this is the pulse with timeStamp 2026-07-23T03:20:00.000Z exactly

derivation.downstream: the master seed then enters the frozen G6/G7 per-world derivation SHA-256(master_seed || world_name) unchanged, as enforced by the G8 loader
derivation.master_seed_hex: the lowercase hexadecimal SHA-256 digest of the 64 bytes obtained by hex-decoding the selected pulse's outputValue field

manifest_id_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON with manifest_id omitted

ordering_witness.role: ordering witness only, proving Part I sealed before Part II was preregistered; never a seed source -- Part I outputs are precomputable by design (plan section 6)

purpose: Part II seed-source hardening (plan section 5 and open question 8.1, resolved: beacon): the fresh master seed is derived from a named public randomness beacon pulse committed to here before it exists, removing seed discretion mechanically rather than by attestation. The sealed Part I margins sit within +/-0.03 of zero at two of seven coordinates, so seed shopping could plausibly move the headline interior-decisiveness count; this commitment makes it impossible, not merely disavowed.
